name: Chlorsulfaquinoxaline
description: Chlorsulfaquinoxaline has been used in trials studying the treatment of Lung Cancer and Colorectal Cancer.

interactions.name: Mecamylamine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Chlorsulfaquinoxaline is combined with Mecamylamine.

interactions.name: Dexketoprofen
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Dexketoprofen is combined with Chlorsulfaquinoxaline.
